texts.LongWelcomeMessage: Welcome to the application. This is a startup project based on the ABP framework. For more information, visit abp.io.
texts.Landing:Title: One Elearning platform, two focused experiences.
texts.Landing:Subtitle: The system is standardized around a shared ABP backend and two Razor Pages entry points: Admin for operations and Client for learning.
texts.Landing:ClientCardDescription: Learners browse, enroll, study and track progress in a focused portal.
texts.Landing:AdminCardDescription: Operators manage courses, users, reports and platform configuration in a separate workspace.
texts.Client:Title: Client portal
texts.Client:Description: This area is designed for learners to discover courses, continue lessons and follow their study journey.
texts.Client:Feature:Catalog: Course catalog, categories and featured learning paths
texts.Client:Feature:LearningPath: Enrollment, lesson playback and course detail journeys
texts.Client:Feature:Progress: Personal dashboard, progress tracking and certificates
texts.Client:HeroSubtitle: Use the client side for course discovery, enrollment and personal progress.
texts.Client:Section:Dashboard: Recommended courses, latest lessons and your learning streak should live here.
texts.Client:Section:Enrollment: Enrollment, payment and course access flows should be grouped in the client experience.
texts.Client:Section:Profile: Profile, certificates, bookmarks and notifications should stay learner-focused.
texts.Admin:Title: Admin portal
texts.Admin:Description: This area is for internal operations, content governance and system administration.
texts.Admin:Feature:Users: User, instructor, role and permission administration
texts.Admin:Feature:Reports: Operational dashboards, reports and moderation workflows
texts.Admin:HeroSubtitle: Use the admin side for content operations, user management and business reporting.
texts.Admin:Section:Content: Course authoring, lesson ordering and content review should be grouped in admin.
texts.Admin:Section:Operations: Enrollment oversight, learner support and moderation flows belong here.
texts.Admin:Section:Settings: System settings, permissions and platform configuration remain in admin only.
texts.Accounts:Title: Accounts management
texts.Accounts:Summary: Manage platform users by reusing ABP Identity services, roles and permissions already built into the solution.
texts.Accounts:SearchPlaceholder: Search by username, name or email
texts.Accounts:Name: First name
texts.Accounts:ListSubtitle: This page uses ABP Identity to manage users without creating a separate account system.
texts.Accounts:ConfirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this account?
texts.Accounts:CreateDescription: Create a new user directly through ABP Identity services.
texts.Accounts:EditDescription: Update the basic account profile and activation status.
texts.QuestionTypes:Title: Question type management
texts.QuestionTypes:ListSubtitle: Manage question type definitions used by the question bank, exams and practice modules.
texts.QuestionTypes:SearchPlaceholder: Search by code, name or description
texts.QuestionTypes:CreateDescription: Create a new question type configuration for question authoring.
texts.QuestionTypes:EditDescription: Update display name, answer input behavior and scoring rules.
texts.QuestionTypes:CodeHelp: Use lowercase letters, numbers, underscores or hyphens only. Example: single_choice.
texts.QuestionTypes:CodeReadonlyHelp: The code is stable so existing questions do not lose their type mapping.
texts.QuestionTypes:ConfirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this question type?
texts.Questions:Title: Question management
texts.Questions:ListSubtitle: Manage the question bank by type: choice questions, matching questions and essays.
texts.Questions:SearchPlaceholder: Search by title, content or explanation
texts.Questions:CreateDescription: Select a question type and fill the matching answer section.
texts.Questions:EditDescription: Update question content, answers and settings. The question type remains fixed after creation.
texts.Questions:PreviewDescription: Review the question content, answers and explanation before using it in exams or practice modules.
texts.Questions:QuestionTypeReadonlyHelp: Do not change the question type after creation to avoid invalid answer structures.
texts.Questions:OptionsHelp: Single-choice questions require exactly one correct answer. Multiple-choice questions require at least one correct answer.
texts.Questions:MatchingPairsHelp: Matching questions require at least two complete pairs.
texts.Questions:ConfirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this question?
texts.Questions:Import:Title: Import Excel
texts.Questions:Import:Description: Download the template, fill questions in Excel, then upload it so the system can validate and import questions as drafts.
texts.Questions:Import:TemplateDescription: The template contains SingleChoice, MultipleChoice, Matching and Essay sheets. Keep sheet names and column names unchanged.
texts.Questions:Import:Failed: The file has {0} errors. No rows were imported.
texts.Questions:Import:FixHint: Fix the errors using the sheet, row and column details below, then upload the file again.
texts.Auth:GuestMessage: You need to sign in to access the learner portal.
